workers.focus: Focus on test rigor and edge cases.
Focus on simplicity and economy of implementation.
Focus on defensive robustness: validate inputs and fail loudly on contract violations.
Focus on faithfulness to the PRD's report format and on user-facing clarity of the generated report.

gate.name: report-noninteractive
command: rm -f gate-report.md && python3 -m wine_stock_reporter examples/stock_sample.csv --no-interactive --output gate-report.md && test -s gate-report.md

gate.name: report-interactive-eof
command: rm -f gate-report-eof.md && printf '' | python3 -m wine_stock_reporter examples/stock_sample.csv --output gate-report-eof.md && test -s gate-report-eof.md

done.name: report-noninteractive
command: rm -f gate-report.md && python3 -m wine_stock_reporter examples/stock_sample.csv --no-interactive --output gate-report.md && test -s gate-report.md

done.name: report-interactive-eof
command: rm -f gate-report-eof.md && printf '' | python3 -m wine_stock_reporter examples/stock_sample.csv --output gate-report-eof.md && test -s gate-report-eof.md
